title: DeepslateCutter
description: Cut 'raw deepslate' into all 'cobbled deepslate' recipes in the stonecutter.
body:
### Lightweight, server-side only plugin – no client mods required!
_Stop wasting time placing and re-mining deepslate to get cobbled deepslate! With this plugin, you can now use normal deepslate directly in a stonecutter exactly like cobbled deepslate — a true quality-of-life improvement for builders and miners alike._

**With this plugin, you can now cut deepslate directly in a stonecutter into all the recipes normally available for cobbled deepslate.**

### # **Features**

- Use raw deepslate in the stonecutter exactly like cobbled deepslate.
- Unlocks all associated recipes automatically: stairs, slabs, walls, polished variants, tiles, bricks, chiseled, and more.
- Lightweight, efficient, and fully server-side — no client mods needed.
- Future-proof: automatically includes any new cobbled deepslate recipes added by vanilla updates.
- Saves time and effort — no need to switch from your silk-touch pickaxe or place/mine blocks again.

**Works on Minecraft 1.20 – 1.21.**

### # **Installation**

- Download the latest version of the plugin.
- Drop the .jar file into your server’s plugins folder.
- Restart your server - no configuration required.

Enjoy building with easier deepslate crafting!

### # **Compatibility**

- Fully compatible with Paper and forks (e.g., Purpur, Folia).
- Designed to work seamlessly alongside other plugins.
